message:
🐛 Fix 4 test failures from shared.ts and useLocalAgent changes (Fixes #10473) (#10475)

- Add missing agentFetch export to mcp/shared mock in useCachedData.test.ts
- Update api-contract.test.ts to read from routes_health.go (routes were
  moved out of server.go)
- Fix regex patterns for tab-free Go source indentation

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
